creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  I made further changes that allow the patch-aa file 
to be submitted back to the authors.  Specifically, it now respects CC as 
well as PTHREAD_[CFLAGS,LIBS] and GLIB_CONFIG.  I added a new variable called 
XMMS_CONFIG that further allows environmental control of the build.  Overall, 
the entire thing looks a lot cleaner now.
